title: Dense Crispy Malaysian Tandoor Satay
description: Tangy, crispy, crowd-pleaser Malaysian dish featuring marzipan. Served on a banana leaf for an authentic Mediterranean experience.
instructions: Preheat your tandoor oven to 450°F for at least 30 minutes.
In a blender or food processor, blend the marzipan, coconut milk, ginger, brown sugar, lemongrass paste, garlic, salt, and black pepper until well combined.
Add the chicken breast to the marinade and mix until coated.
Thread the chicken onto skewers, leaving a small space between each piece.
Soak the banana leaves in water for at least 30 minutes before use.
Place a piece of banana leaf on a flat surface and arrange 2-3 skewers on it, leaving a small space between each skewer.
Fold the banana leaf over the skewers to form a packet.
Brush the tandoor oven with oil to prevent sticking.
Place the packets in the preheated tandoor oven and cook for 12-15 minutes, or until the chicken is cooked through.
Remove the packets from the oven and serve immediately.
